title: Composition, Collaboration, and Dependency Boundaries · Transfer Build
summary: Connect catalog, lending policy, notification, clock, and persistence collaborators without hidden globals. The scenario, data, constraints, and failure modes differ from the workshop. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of a composed circulation service with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Model has-a relationships with explicit ownership, lifetime, and mutation responsibilities.
Delegate behavior through a narrow collaborator API without leaking its complete representation.
Supply time, storage, messaging, and policy dependencies explicitly so behavior is replaceable and testable.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
